recommendations.title: Long Time Dead
recommendations.overview: A group of British students embark on summoning spirits on a Ouija board after a night of clubbing. But someone breaks the link before they have finished and now a demon is trapped in their world and the only way to banish it, is for all the people w

recommendations.title: MadS
recommendations.overview: A teenager stops off to see his dealer to test a new drug before heading off for a night of partying. On the way home, he picks up an injured woman, and the night takes a surreal turn.

recommendations.title: Panic Button
recommendations.overview: Four young men have won a trip with their favorite social network. On board the private plane that took him to New York, they are invited to participate in an in-flight entertainment: a new online gaming experience. But this is no ordinary Thurs Trap

recommendations.title: Screamboat
recommendations.overview: A late-night boat ride turns into a desperate fight for survival in New York City when a mischievous mouse becomes a monstrous reality.

recommendations.title: Crocodile
recommendations.overview: Eight college students board a houseboat for spring break that promises to be the best of their young lives...how many will survive?

recommendations.title: Emergency
recommendations.overview: Ready for a night of legendary partying, three college students must weigh the pros and cons of calling the police when faced with an unexpected situation.

recommendations.title: We Made a Beautiful Bouquet
recommendations.overview: Two people meet each other after missing the last train home, leading to a beautiful relationship over five years.

recommendations.title: Truth or Dare
recommendations.overview: A group of friends are lured to an isolated cabin by a promise of heavy partying, only to find themselves in a nightmarish game of truth or dare.

recommendations.title: The Final
recommendations.overview: A group of high school outcasts get revenge on the students that torment them.

recommendations.title: The Super
recommendations.overview: A man becomes the superintendent of a large New York City apartment building where people mysteriously go missing.
